---
title: "tago-doks"
description: "A clean documentation theme for tago, styled after Doks."
---

tago-doks gives a tago site the look of a modern documentation portal: a left
sidebar grouped by section, a right-hand table of contents that tracks your
scroll position, full-text search, and a dark mode that remembers your choice.

Everything renders from Go templates and a single prebuilt stylesheet, so there
is no Node toolchain to install and no asset pipeline to wait on.
